info.name: Competition and Event Registration API
info.description: Role-based collection for the NestJS competition and event registration backend.

exec: console.log('Skipping JSON parsing for response cache:', error.message);

request.description: Check whether the service process is up.
Check whether PostgreSQL and Redis are ready.
Browse public events with filters and pagination.
Fetch full public event details using the event slug.
Fetch the public category tree.
Register a new participant account.
Verify a user's email with the stored verification token.
Log in as a participant and store tokens for participant folders.
Rotate the participant refresh token.
Revoke the participant refresh token.
Inspect the currently authenticated participant session.
Fetch the participant profile document.
Update email or profile metadata for the participant.
Change the participant password.
Upload a participant avatar image.

formdata.description: Attach a jpg/jpeg/png file up to 5 MB.

request.description: Delete the participant account and related profile data.
Create an idempotent registration for a published event.
List registrations that belong to the participant.
Claim an active waitlist offer for the participant.
Cancel a participant registration before the deadline.
Log in as an organizer and store organizer tokens.
Rotate the organizer refresh token.
Revoke the organizer refresh token.
Create a new event as the organizer.
Upload the organizer event hero image.

formdata.description: Attach a jpg/jpeg/png file up to 8 MB.

request.description: Update event metadata, status, or scheduling details.
Delete an event that has no registrations.
List registrations for the organizer-owned event.
Export organizer event registrations as CSV content wrapped in JSON.
Check in a confirmed event registration.
Log in as an admin and store admin tokens.
Rotate the admin refresh token.
Revoke the admin refresh token.
Fetch high-level totals, charts, recent registrations, and recent activity.
List users with pagination and admin filters.
Promote or demote a user role.
Suspend or reactivate a user.
Search registrations across users and events.

query.description: Search registration number, email, or event title

request.description: Export registration rows for any event as CSV content wrapped in JSON.
Fetch all system settings.
Upsert batch system settings.
Create a new category node.
Rename or re-parent an existing category.
Delete a category node.
Fetch all notification templates.
Update a notification template for one notification type.
